scripts.build: npm run build -w @parker/protocol && npm run build -w @parker/game-engine && npm run build -w @parker/settlement && npm run build -w @parker/server && npm run build -w @parker/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @parker/protocol && npm run test -w @parker/game-engine && npm run test -w @parker/settlement && npm run test -w @parker/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @parker/protocol && npm run typecheck -w @parker/game-engine && npm run typecheck -w @parker/settlement && npm run typecheck -w @parker/server && npm run typecheck -w @parker/web
